pages.text: After infusing the power of magic into echoing shards, you obtained a more profound echoing shard, in which the endless echoes from the Deep Dark are sealed. You can use it as a catalyst to create an allied version of the ancient guardian that once gave you so much trouble — it is completely made of your soul energy, so it will regard you as a kindred. See Shadow Shrieker for details.

In addition to being used to make Warden servants, the Profound Echoing Shard also contains the power to reproduce lost skills. It can be used to transform ordinary deepslate into a more durable reinforced form — the reinforced deepslate that ancient people are said to have made.
